description: Log in to Moodle (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) and create a site-level cohort named "Biology Majors Fall 2025" with ID number "BIOMAJ-F25". Add Jane Smith (jsmith), Michael Jones (mjones), Alice Wilson (awilson), and Bob Brown (bbrown) to the cohort. Configure the "General Chemistry" (CHEM101) course to automatically enroll members of this cohort as Students using the "Cohort sync" enrollment method.
